creator: kevinxlinuz@163.com
text:
USB mode have some problems when I try to mount sony psp.
It likes this:
~> sudo mount_msdosfs /dev/da0s1 /mnt/
mount_msdosfs: /dev/da0s1: Input/output error
And dmesg:

Fix: 

usb cable plus on other usb interface.
How-To-Repeat: Keep usb cable on same usb interface.
Set psp on usb mode then mount the psp,umount it soon.when I try to mount psp again,where an error.
